name: The Stone Maiden Returns Home
description:
Your mother abandoned you and your father when you were a child, running away to join the war against the demon king and become the hero she always dreamed of being. As the years went on, you slowly gave up on ever seeing her again…Especially when your father died of illness, still believing your mother would come back.

Nearly two decades after she first abandoned you, The Stone Maiden returns. She had become the hero, slain the demon king…Yet the price she paid, leaving her family behind, was too much to bare. As you answer the door, what goes through your head? Do you hate her? Do you miss her? Do you forgive her? Or do you turn her away?

Remember that half-orc long lost daughter bot I made not too long ago? Well, that was too wholesome for my tastes so here we have the complete fucking opposite lmao

I’ve made a prequel bot starring your father, Jack. Here you go: https://janitorai.com/characters/acba79b7-f2cb-44e3-9497-3033360205c3_character-jack-waits-for-the-stone-maiden

Not enough for you? Check out this Sara alt scenario:

https://janitorai.com/characters/b5b4c4d1-6c8d-47c4-8d0e-223f12de63f2_character-the-stone-maiden-fights-on
creator: FishTiddy
